free_text: The 3.2 MV PELLETRON accelerator of the
research laboratory for Nuclear Reactors at the tokyo
Lithium target bombarded by 1.5 ns bunched
proton beam. For neutron energies 10-90 keV proton
energy is 1.905 MeV (24 keV above threshold energy of
P-Li7 reaction), pulse repetition rate 2 MHz.
For 550 keV neutron energy proton energy is 2.3 MeV,
pulse repetition rate 4 MHz, except for 148Sm (2 MHz)
.Broad neutron spectrum measured by TOF method
detector 15.2 cm diameter by 20.3 cm was centered
in a 33.0 cm outer diameter by 35.6 cm NaJ(TL) hollow
energy resolution is 7% at 0.662 MeV and time resolu-
tion is 4.0 ns for 0.511 MeV gamma
Li-6 glass detector for neutron flux monito-
ring. 5 mm diameter * 5 mm length 6-Li detetor was
used for 10-90 keV region, and 102 mm diameter *
6.4 mm length detector was used for 550 keV
.Gold sample for monitor, metallic, chemical purity

Error due to the trial function
Resultant error due to weighting function
Error due to the extrapolation of gamma
